visual_description: The video opens on a busy, somewhat cluttered office environment. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing several men in a bustling scene. In the foreground, a man in a dark suit is seen from the back, carrying a large, orange, hard-shell briefcase. To his left, another man in a light-colored, button-down shirt is also in motion. In the background, more men are visible, some standing and talking, others moving around. The setting appears to be a workspace, with desks, computer monitors, and a whiteboard covered in writing and photos. The whiteboard is a prominent feature in the background. On the far left, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera pans slightly to the right, following the movement of the men. The focus shifts, bringing a man in a light purple button-down shirt into clearer view. He has a serious expression and is looking down, seemingly focused on something out of frame. Other men continue to move around him, creating a sense of a busy, active atmosphere. The camera remains relatively steady, maintaining a medium shot on the central group of men. The Chinese text "风行网" remains on the left side of the screen. The shot is slightly shaky,
